user.title: Set up Steam Dashboard
user.description:
Please enter your 64-Bit Steam ID and your Web API Key.

[You can create a Steam API Key here](https://steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey)

Tip: You can use tools like steamid.io to find your Steam ID64.

error.invalid_steam_id: The Steam ID must consist of exactly 17 digits.

abort.already_configured: This Steam profile is already configured.
